zh.lifeSummary: 當Ann Armesby於1572年5月15日出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾素爾格拉福時，她的父親John Armesby27歲，母親Frances Frost20歲。她於1602年10月28日與Thomas Gleason II在英國英格蘭素福爾可考費爾德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1624年3月8日在她的家鄉享年51歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ann Armesby于1572年5月15日出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾素爾格拉福时，她的父亲John Armesby27岁，母亲Frances Frost20岁。她于1602年10月28日与Thomas Gleason II在英国英格兰素福爾可考費爾德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1624年3月8日在她的家乡享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: Armesby
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Ormsby
meanings: English: habitational name from North and South Ormsby (Lincolnshire), or either of two places called Ormesby in Norfolk and the North Yorkshire. The placenames all derive from the Old Norse personal name Ormr + Old Norse bȳ ‘farmstead, village’. This surname is also common in Ireland (Connacht), where it has been established since the late 16th century.

nameMeanings.name: Ann
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of Anne . In the U.S. Ann is the more frequent spelling.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Ann Armesby was born on 15 May 1572, in Sulgrave, Northamptonshire, England, her father, John Armesby, was 27 and her mother, Frances Frost, was 20. She married Thomas Gleason II on 28 October 1602, in Cockfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 8 March 1624, in her hometown, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ann Armesby est née le 15 mai 1572, à Sulgrave, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, John Armesby, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Frances Frost, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Gleason II le 28 octobre 1602, à Cockfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 8 mars 1624, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ann Armesby am 15. Mai 1572 in Sulgrave, Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Armesby 27 und ihre Mutter Frances Frost 20. Sie hat am 28. Oktober 1602 in Cockfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Thomas Gleason II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 8. März 1624 im Alter von 51 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ann Armesby è nata il il 15 maggio 1572 nel Sulgrave, Northamptonshire, England, sua padre, John Armesby, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Frances Frost, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Gleason II il 28 ottobre 1602, nel Cockfield, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 8 marzo 1624, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ann Armesbyが1572年5月15日にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアスルグラブで生まれた時，父John Armesbyは27歳，母Frances Frostは20歳であった。1602年10月28日にイギリスイギリススフォルクコクフィールドでThomas Gleason IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1624年3月8日に故郷で51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ann Armesby(이)가 1572년 5월 15일 영국 노르섬프토실르 설그레이브에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Armesby(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Frances Frost(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1602년 10월 28일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 콕필드에서 Thomas Gleason II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1624년 3월 8일 그녀의 고향에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.Thorpe Morieux, Suffolk, England: Thorpe Morieux, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ann Armesby nasceu em 15 de maio de 1572, em Sulgrave, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Armesby, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Frances Frost, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Gleason II em 28 de outubro de 1602, em Cockfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 8 de março de 1624, em sua cidade natal, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ann Armesby родилась 15 мая 1572 г. в местности сулграв, нортамптоншир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Armesby было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Frances Frost, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Gleason II 28 октября 1602 г. в местности коккфиелд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 8 марта 1624 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 51 год.

Se casó con Thomas Gleason II el 28 de octubre de 1602, en Cockfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas.
